name: Jhayco
description: '''Jesús Manuel Nieves Cortés''' (born April 9, 1993), known professionally as '''Jhayco''' ({{IPAc-en|ˈ|dʒ|eɪ|k|oʊ}}; formerly '''Jhay Cortez'''), is a [[Puerto Ricans|Puerto Rican]] rapper and singer. After releasing multiple EPs, his debut studio album, ''[[Famouz]],'' was released in 2019.
